title: Genetic risk for neurodevelopmental disorders as a potential factor affecting antipsychotic responsiveness in schizophrenia: a postmortem brain study.
abstract: Postmortem brain GWAS analysis of 24 schizophrenia patients and 48 controls. Computed ADHD-PRS and ASD-PRS from public GWAS data. ARS of positive symptoms showed suggestive negative correlation with ADHD-PRS and positive correlation with ASD-PRS (did not survive multiple testing). 1,773 DEGs identified, enriched in neuronal system and mitochondrial pathways.
methods: GWAS, PRS calculation, postmortem brain RNA-seq, pathway analysis
summary: Postmortem brain GWAS analysis of 24 schizophrenia patients and 48 controls. Computed ADHD-PRS and ASD-PRS from public GWAS data.
